title: What's Really Inside AI?
modules: When AI Gets It Totally Wrong
synopsis: You've been hired as a junior engineer at a company whose AI keeps making strange mistakes — and it's your job to figure out why. By investigating each glitch inside the story, you'll uncover exactly how AI models are trained, how they reason, and where they fall apart.
rationale: Students aged 11-13 interact with AI tools daily but overwhelmingly treat them as magic, leaving them unable to critically evaluate outputs or understand why errors occur.
learning_outcome: Students can explain in their own words how an AI model learns from data, predict the kinds of mistakes it will make, and produce a written 'AI error report' diagnosing a real failure.
